member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Client.RpcClientOptions
member.summary: Configuration used to create a client runtime or generated client facade.
member.remarks: The options object owns the selected transport and serializer references. If security is configured, wraps the transport in a .

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Client.RpcClientOptions.#ctor(Lakona.Rpc.Core.ITransport,Lakona.Rpc.Core.IRpcSerializer)
member.summary: Creates client runtime options.
member.param: Concrete transport used by the client.
Serializer used for RPC method payloads.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Client.RpcClientOptions.KeepAlive
member.summary: Optional keepalive configuration. Disabled by default.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Client.RpcClientOptions.Serializer
member.summary: Serializer used for request, response, and push payloads.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Client.RpcClientOptions.Security
member.summary: Mutable frame security configuration.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Client.RpcClientOptions.Transport
member.summary: Underlying transport before optional security wrapping.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Client.RpcClientOptions.UseSecurity(System.Action{Lakona.Rpc.Core.TransportSecurityConfig})
member.summary: Configures compression or encryption for the client transport.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Client.RpcClientOptions.CreateConfiguredTransport
member.summary: Returns the transport that should be passed to the runtime.
member.returns: The original transport when security is disabled; otherwise a wrapping the original transport.

member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Client.RpcNotificationPayloadHandler
member.summary: Handles a serialized server-to-client notification payload.

member.name: T:Lakona.Rpc.Client.RpcClientRuntime
member.summary: Default client runtime for Lakona.Rpc request/response calls and server notification dispatch.
member.remarks: The runtime owns background receive, notification, and keepalive loops after . Notification handlers run on the runtime notification loop and are not marshalled to the Unity main thread.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Client.RpcClientRuntime.#ctor(Lakona.Rpc.Client.RpcClientOptions)
member.summary: Creates a runtime from client options.
member.param: Client options containing transport, serializer, keepalive, and security settings.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Client.RpcClientRuntime.#ctor(Lakona.Rpc.Core.ITransport,Lakona.Rpc.Core.IRpcSerializer,Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcKeepAliveOptions)
member.summary: Creates a runtime from explicit transport and serializer instances.
member.param: Connected or connectable transport used by the runtime.

member.name: E:Lakona.Rpc.Client.RpcClientRuntime.Disconnected
member.summary: Raised when the receive loop ends.
member.remarks: The event argument is the disconnect reason when one is available. A null value means a normal or locally requested shutdown.

member.name: E:Lakona.Rpc.Client.RpcClientRuntime.UnhandledNotificationReceived
member.summary: Raised when a server-to-client notification frame has no registered handler.

member.name: E:Lakona.Rpc.Client.RpcClientRuntime.NotificationHandlerException
member.summary: Raised when a registered notification handler throws.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Client.RpcClientRuntime.LastSendAt
member.summary: Last UTC timestamp at which the runtime sent a frame.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Client.RpcClientRuntime.LastReceiveAt
member.summary: Last UTC timestamp at which the runtime received a frame.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Client.RpcClientRuntime.LastRtt
member.summary: Last measured keepalive round-trip time, when RTT measurement is enabled.

member.name: P:Lakona.Rpc.Client.RpcClientRuntime.TimedOutByKeepAlive
member.summary: Indicates whether the runtime stopped because keepalive timed out.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Client.RpcClientRuntime.StartAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connects the transport and starts background runtime loops.
member.param: Cancellation token for the initial transport connection.
member.exception: Thrown when the runtime has already been started.
Thrown when the runtime has been disposed.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Client.RpcClientRuntime.RegisterNotificationHandler``1(Lakona.Rpc.Core.RpcNotificationMethod{``0},System.Action{``0})
member.summary: Registers a synchronous handler for a server-to-client notification method.

member.name: M:Lakona.Rpc.Client.RpcClientRuntime.DisposeAsync
member.summary: Stops background loops, fails pending requests, and disposes the transport.
